items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the geofencing requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the geofencing feature, specifically that users must be within a certain distance of the job site to clock in. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. As a result, the validation is blocked due to a lack of sufficient evidence to assert either coverage or a gap.
